key_value_pairs.description: A Delaware state certificate of incorporation, signed by the Secretary of State, with a seal and date.

form_fields.value: SECRETARY OF STATE OF THE STATE OF DELAWARE
CERTIFY THE ATTACHED IS A TRUE AND CORRECT COPY OF THE CERTIFICATE OF INCORPORATION OF

form_fields.field_name: FILED IN THIS OFFICE ON THE TENTH DAY OF JANUARY, A.D. 2007
